languages.text: {n}Тервантьяс, отвратительно улыбаясь, наблюдает как кровь брызжет изо рта Эоганна, и тот почти захлебывается ей.{/n} "Хороший образец — ты знаешь как польстить, в отличие этого ничтожества. Он мне наскучил, будет твоей наградой".

{n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."
languages.original_text: {n}Тервантьяс, отвратительно улыбаясь, наблюдает как кровь брызжет изо рта Эоганна, и тот почти захлебывается ей.{/n} "Хороший образец — ты знаешь как польстить, в отличие этого ничтожества. Он мне наскучил, будет твоей наградой".

traits.locale_text: {n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood jets from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in the gore.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me, consider it your reward."

{n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood jets from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in the gore.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me, consider it your reward."

{n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."

{n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."

{n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."

{n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."

languages.text: {n}Mit einem widerlichen Grinsen sieht Tervantias zu, wie Blut aus Eogunns Mund quillt und ihn beinahe darin ertrinken lässt.{/n} "Braves Versuchsstück. Ihr wisst, wie man mich erfreut. Es amüsiert mich nicht mehr. Betrachtet es als Eure Belohnung."
languages.original_text: {n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem widerlichen Grinsen sieht Tervantias zu, wie Blut aus Eogunns Mund quillt und ihn beinahe darin ertrinken lässt.{/n} "Braves Versuchsstück. Ihr wisst, wie man mich erfreut. Es amüsiert mich nicht mehr. Betrachtet es als Eure Belohnung."

languages.text: {n}Le visage de Tervantias se fend d'un sourire écœurant tandis qu'il observe le sang gicler de la bouche d'Eogunn, qui manque de s'étouffer.{/n} « Brave spécimen. Vous, au moins, savez comment me faire plaisir. Celui-ci ne m'amuse plus. Emportez-le, ce sera votre récompense. »
languages.original_text: {n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage de Tervantias se fend d'un sourire écœurant tandis qu'il observe le sang gicler de la bouche d'Eogunn, qui manque de s'étouffer.{/n} « Brave spécimen. Vous, au moins, savez comment me faire plaisir. Celui-ci ne m'amuse plus. Emportez-le, ce sera votre récompense. »

languages.text: {n}Con una sonrisa nauseabunda, Tervantias observa cómo brota la sangre de la boca de Eogunn, que casi se ahoga en ella.{/n} «Buen espécimen. Sabes agradarme, no como esta piltrafa. Ya no me interesa. Quédatela a modo de recompensa».
languages.original_text: {n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."

traits.locale_text: {n}Con una sonrisa nauseabunda, Tervantias observa cómo brota la sangre de la boca de Eogunn, que casi se ahoga en ella.{/n} «Buen espécimen. Sabes agradarme, no como esta piltrafa. Ya no me interesa. Quédatela a modo de recompensa».

languages.text: {n}Mide bulandırıcı bir sırıtış takınan Tervantias, Eogunn'un ağzından fışkıran kanın onu neredeyse içinde boğulacak hâle getirmesini izliyor.{/n} "İyi numune, bu sefilin aksine beni memnun etmeyi biliyorsun. Artık beni eğlendirmiyor. Onu ödülün olarak kabul edebilirsin."
languages.original_text: {n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mide bulandırıcı bir sırıtış takınan Tervantias, Eogunn'un ağzından fışkıran kanın onu neredeyse içinde boğulacak hâle getirmesini izliyor.{/n} "İyi numune, bu sefilin aksine beni memnun etmeyi biliyorsun. Artık beni eğlendirmiyor. Onu ödülün olarak kabul edebilirsin."

languages.text: {n}特万提亚斯带着一抹令人作呕的假笑，看着鲜血从伊奥贡口中喷涌而出，几乎将他溺毙。{/n}“好样本，你很懂得怎么取悦我，不像这个废物。我已经对它失去兴趣，这就算是赏你的了。”
languages.original_text: {n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."

traits.locale_text: {n}特万提亚斯带着一抹令人作呕的假笑，看着鲜血从伊奥贡口中喷涌而出，几乎将他溺毙。{/n}“好样本，你很懂得怎么取悦我，不像这个废物。我已经对它失去兴趣，这就算是赏你的了。”

languages.text: {n}むかつくような薄笑いを浮かべ、テルヴァンティアスは、エオガンの口から血が噴き出し、彼がそれに溺れかけるさまを眺めている。{/n}「いい標本だ、この惨めな奴と違って、貴様は喜ばせ方を心得ている。これはもう私を楽しませはせん。貴様への褒美と思え」
languages.original_text: {n}With a nauseating smirk, Tervantias looks on as blood spurts from Eogunn's mouth, leaving him nearly drowning in it.{/n} "Good specimen, you know how to please, unlike this wretch. It no longer amuses me; consider it your reward."

traits.locale_text: {n}むかつくような薄笑いを浮かべ、テルヴァンティアスは、エオガンの口から血が噴き出し、彼がそれに溺れかけるさまを眺めている。{/n}「いい標本だ、この惨めな奴と違って、貴様は喜ばせ方を心得ている。これはもう私を楽しませはせん。貴様への褒美と思え」
